title: ModelBus Consumer Bridge Config (modelbus.consumer_bridge_config.v1)
description: Per-consumer bridge config emitted as part of a bundle by scripts/ci/build_consumer_bundle.py. Captures the runtime endpoint, alias / mode / capability mapping per surface, and the release-window provenance the consumer should treat as authoritative for the bundle's lifetime. Bundle consumers (e.g. DataPulse) read this file at load time; live-API consumers do not need it.

generated_at_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which the bridge config was emitted.

base_url.description: ModelBus runtime base URL the consumer should call against.

request_protocol.description: Wire protocol the consumer should default to (e.g. 'openai-chat-completions'). Empty allowed when the consumer is bundle-only and never opens a live connection.

endpoint.description: Relative endpoint path under base_url. Empty allowed for bundle-only consumers.

bus_key_env.description: Environment variable name the consumer should read the bus key from. Empty allowed when the consumer does not need auth.

tenant_env.description: Environment variable name for tenant identifier (P4).

tenant_header.description: HTTP header name the runtime expects the tenant identifier on.

accepted_protocols.description: Wire protocols the consumer profile is willing to accept. null means 'inherit profile default'.

generated_at_utc.description: Timestamp on the release facts snapshot that produced this bridge config.

constitutional_semantics.description: Derived MB release semantic literal (e.g. 'CONSTRAINED-DEPLOYED'). See modelbus.constitutional_semantics.infer_release_level.

alias_by_surface.description: Mapping surface_id → requested alias the consumer should ask the runtime for.

capability_packages_by_surface.description: Mapping surface_id → list of capability_package ids the surface depends on. Surfaces with no package bindings are omitted from the mapping (object may be empty).
